_about: Notional list API prices in USD per 1,000,000 tokens. On a Claude Code subscription (Pro/Max) you are NOT billed per token — these figures are an EQUIVALENT cost so you can compare the relative expense of flows/sessions, not your actual bill. Edit freely when prices change.

_multipliers._about: Cache and long-context rates are derived from each model's base input rate.

_match: Model id is normalized by substring (opus|sonnet|haiku|fable). A '[1m]' suffix is recorded but the >200K long-context premium is NOT applied in v1 (documented under-count). Unknown models cost 0 and are flagged.

fable._placeholder: Fable 5 price unconfirmed — update when known.
